supported_triggers.description: The list of triggers that this action supports. At this time, an action can only target a single trigger at a time.

code.description: The source code of the action.

dependencies.description: The list of third party npm modules, and their versions, that this action depends on.

runtime.description: The Node runtime. For example: `node22`, defaults to `node22`

secrets.description: The list of secrets that are included in an action or a version of an action.

modules.description: The list of action modules and their versions used by this action.

deploy.description: True if the action should be deployed after creation.
